{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322061953A5F409E2CCC5D0BEB1B6"}"},"total":30},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611335560292811544","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常不错，尤其是喜欢种田，基建的小说爱好者。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772155267,"group_id":"7600736114004986904","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxQI/A6Bw/E1WYDtnSFqxS4f6/xCNQMwOTTbRanlk9x6","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1758818637187501","user_name":"用户17588186"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1758818637187501","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7600736114004986904","book_info":{"abstract":"【硬核科幻+大国重工+星际基建】
毕设被驳回？大四学生苏川转身走进废品站，用一堆破铜烂铁手搓出微型可控核聚变！
当幽蓝尾焰冲天而起，国家队火速接管，大夏的重工暴走模式正式开启！
但这只是文明跨跃的序幕。
当其他人还在争夺地球资源时，苏川已将算力推向星辰大海：
拆解水星！打造十五亿面反射帆的戴森云，把太阳降格为专属电池！
改造火星！播种碳硅共生植物，将赤色行星化作产能百亿的生物电容兵工厂！
大自然从不仁慈，当无限能量遭遇地球质量枷锁，大夏被逼至热力学死角。
苏川甩出“洛希远征”图纸，十万重型工业舰船剑指太阳系霸主——木星！
“地球的骨架太轻，撑不起大夏的星际长城舰队。”
“既然岩石行星资源见底，那就去木星的引力深渊，用电磁风暴抽干它的液态金属氢海洋！”
抛弃幻想，直面零下二百七十度的深空。面对冷酷的宇宙法则，大夏唯有以重工业为长矛，撕裂引力，折叠时空，硬生生将整个太阳系焊成文明远航的终极堡垒！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/72fc44d8c6dc85386c6b780a04ff830e","author":"江鸟1","author_id":"","book_id":"7600736114004986904","book_name":"大国重工：从核聚变到横推星海","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102038","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":854,"name":"黑科技","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=854&name=黑科技&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7600736201934373400","read_count":"65701","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"520507"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"227","tags":"科幻末世,系统,打脸,黑科技","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/513826b697b6cde6bbaaf0cd9a496779~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779315593&x-signature=Hgg0cL94O9F%2F1ukmF66zWLiPA0Q%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2370996104604016","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322061953A5F409E2CCC5D0BEB1B6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3028},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1772155379,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"us
